$comment: This is a draft schema for FedRAMP submissions. It is not yet finalized and may change in the future.
title: FedRAMP Security Decision Record (CR26-SDR)
description: JSON Schema for Cloud Service Provider (CSP) system submission for FedRAMP certification.

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Full name of the Cloud Service Offering

serviceAcronym.title: Service Acronym
serviceAcronym.description: Short acronym or abbreviation for the Cloud Service Offering

providerName.title: Provider Name
providerName.description: Name of the Cloud Service Provider

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: A brief description of the Cloud Service Offering. May use Markdown for formatting.

authorizationPath.title: Authorization Path
authorizationPath.description: The FedRAMP authorization path for the Cloud Service Offering. This will define which data elements are required.

fedrampPackageId.title: FedRAMP Package ID
fedrampPackageId.description: FedRAMP Package ID for the Cloud Service Offering

serviceType.title: Service Type
serviceType.description: Type of cloud service model. Select all that apply

digitalIdentityLevel.title: Digital Identity Level
digitalIdentityLevel.description: Digital Identity Level. Select the highest level of digital identity that the Cloud Service Offering supports.

repositories.title: Repositories
repositories.description: List of repository locations for the system. Repositories hold information about the system authorization including policies, procedures, security assessment reports, and other relevant documents.

authenticationRequired.title: Authentication Required
authenticationRequired.description: Whether authentication is required to access the repository

accessRequestInstructions.title: Access Request Instructions
accessRequestInstructions.description: Instructions for requesting access to the repository. May use Markdown for formatting.

leveragedServices.title: Leveraged Services
leveragedServices.description: List of services that the system relies on to store or process customer data.

fedrampId.title: FedRAMP ID
fedrampId.description: FedRAMP ID of the leveraged service if applicable.

serviceType.title: Type
serviceType.description: Type of the leveraged service. Corporate services are those owned by the CSP in a CSP-controlled environment. External cloud services used to support corporate are not corporate services. Update services are services that inject code or data into the CSP's infrastructure but do not process or store federal data (e.g., software repositories, build servers, virus definitions, etc.).

serviceName.title: System/Service/API/CLI Name
serviceName.description: Name of the leveraged service. Provide the name and vendor name if different.

connectionDetails.title: Connection Details
connectionDetails.description: Details about how the system connects to the leveraged service. Note whether inbound, outbound, or both as well as ports, protocols, authentication, and encryption.

natureOfAgreement.title: Nature of Agreement
natureOfAgreement.description: Nature of the agreement with the leveraged service (e.g., EULA, SLA, App License, Contract, etc.).

vendorSupport.title: Vendor Support
vendorSupport.description: Indicates whether the leveraged service is  supported by the vendor.

dataTypes.title: Data Types
dataTypes.description: Types of data handled by the leveraged service (e.g. customer data, identity data, system logs, etc.).

authorizedUsersAndAuthentication.title: Authorized Users and Authentication
authorizedUsersAndAuthentication.description: Details about authorized users. List user roles and the authentication method. For APIs or other system to system connections provide the internal endpoint and authentication details.

otherCompliancePrograms.title: Other Compliance Programs
otherCompliancePrograms.description: Details about other compliance programs with which the system is compliant. List certifications (e.g., PCI, SOC 2, CSA STAR) and certification dates. Note if FISMA authorized.

hostingEnvironment.title: Hosting Environment
hostingEnvironment.description: Hosting environment of the leveraged service (e.g., corporate network, IaaS, self-hosted).

riskImpactMitigation.title: Risk Impact Mitigation
riskImpactMitigation.description: Describe all risk impact mitigation strategies.

portsAndProtocols.title: Ports and Protocols
portsAndProtocols.description: Ports and protocols used by the Cloud Service Offering

items.title: Port and Protocol
items.description: Port and protocol exposed by the Cloud Service Offering

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Name of the service exposed on this port.

portNumber.title: Port Number
portNumber.description: Port number used by the service. For services that operate on a range of ports, provide the range in the format 'start-end'.

transportProtocol.title: Transport Protocol
transportProtocol.description: Transport protocol used by the service

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.description: Encryption method used by the service (e.g., TLS, SSL, None).

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: Provide a general description of how it is used in the Cloud Service Offering (e.g., Web access, database connection).

contactInformation.title: Contact Information
contactInformation.description: Key contacts for the Cloud Service Provider

primaryContact.title: Primary Contact
primaryContact.description: Primary point of contact for the Cloud Service Offering

securityContact.title: Security Contact
securityContact.description: Point of contact for security-related questions

additionalContacts.title: Additional Contacts
additionalContacts.description: Additional contacts for the Cloud Service Offering

securityControls.title: NIST 800-53 Security Controls and other FedRAMP requirements
securityControls.description: Describe the security controls for the system.

fedRampRequirements.title: FedRAMP Requirements
fedRampRequirements.description: Describe how any applicable FedRAMP required processes are met.

parameterId.title: Parameter ID
parameterId.description: The parameter ID as defined in the NIST 800-53 Control Implementation Guide.

parameterValue.title: Parameter Value
parameterValue.description: The parameter value selected by the Cloud Service Provider. If the parameter is a boolean, provide 'true' or 'false'. If the parameter is a list, provide a comma-separated list of values.

controlImplementationDescription.title: Control Implementation Description
controlImplementationDescription.description: Description of the control implementation. May use Markdown for formatting.

securityAchievement.title: Security Achievement
securityAchievement.description: Specific security achievement such as a specific design choice, process, or other measure that supports the security objective

securityAchievementDescription.title: Security Achievement Description
securityAchievementDescription.description: Explain how this supports the security objective. May use Markdown for formatting.
examples: All inbound connections are restricted to port 443 using SSL/TLS.
All outbound connections are restricted to approved domains.
All IaM systems require multi-factor authentication (MFA).

securityTest.title: Security Test
securityTest.description: How do you monitor the security achievement?

frequency.title: Frequency
frequency.description: Frequency of monitoring the security objective

automated.title: Automated
automated.description: Is the monitoring method is automated

securityTestDescription.title: Security Test Description
securityTestDescription.description: Explain how this security test validates the security achievement. May use Markdown for formatting.

command.title: Command
command.description: Command used to run the security test

assessed.title: Assessed
assessed.description: Assessment result from your independent assessor

assessedOn.title: Assessed On
assessedOn.description: Date and time the assessment was completed

evidenceLocation.title: Evidence Location
evidenceLocation.description: URI or file path to the evidence document

lastUpdated.title: Last Updated
lastUpdated.description: Date when the evidence was last updated

evidenceContent.title: Evidence Content (base64 encoded)
evidenceContent.description: Base64 encoded content of the evidence document

lastUpdated.title: Last Updated
lastUpdated.description: Date when the evidence was last updated

evidenceText.title: Evidence Content (Text)
evidenceText.description: Evidence included as plain text such as the output of a command or log.

lastUpdated.title: Last Updated
lastUpdated.description: Date when the evidence was last updated
